description:
You are the payroll administrator at ABC Company. The company's Q1 2026 holiday calendar has not been configured, causing employees to miss holiday pay. Set up the complete holiday and policy infrastructure in TimeTrex.

Create three recurring holiday definitions: 'New Year's Day' (Type: Fixed, Month: January, Day: 1), 'MLK Day' (Type: Fixed, Month: January, Day: 19), and 'Presidents' Day' (Type: Fixed, Month: February, Day: 16). Create a Holiday Policy named 'Standard Q1 Holidays' (Type: Standard) and link all three recurring holidays to it. Create two pay codes: 'Shift Differential' (Type: Paid) and 'Holiday Premium' (Type: Paid). Create a station with Description: 'Warehouse Entry Kiosk', Type: PC, Source: 10.0.75.10, and Station ID: ANY.

Login credentials: Username: demoadmin, Password: demo
